name: emotion-detector-api
description: Emotion detection API with Groq (Whisper Large V3 + Llama 3.3 70B)

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('public')) fs.mkdirSync('public'); const files = fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f => f.endsWith('.html') || f.endsWith('.css') || f.endsWith('.js')); files.forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(f, `public/${f}`)); console.log('Build completed');"
scripts.build:frontend: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('public')) fs.mkdirSync('public'); const files = fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f => f.endsWith('.html') || f.endsWith('.css') || f.endsWith('.js')); files.forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(f, `public/${f}`)); console.log('Frontend build completed');"
